summary: Tested Emanator AI Builder live streaming preview pipeline and core workspace features. All 8 test cases PASSED. The preview renders correctly with proper iframe height (862px, not 0px), mode label shows 'React (Babel) + Tailwind', Code tab shows generated files, and all right panel tabs are accessible.

minor.issue: billing_issue - Insufficient billing/credits (visible in logs but not blocking functionality)

features_tested.details: Login works via Enter key submission

features_tested.feature: Create new project from hero prompt
features_tested.details: Hero prompt input available on dashboard with Full Stack App, Mobile App, Landing Page options

features_tested.feature: Preview renders correctly after build (iframe has proper height)
Other right panel tabs accessible (Assets, Logs, Export, Deploy)
features_tested.details: All tabs clickable and render content

features_tested.feature: Chat input available for direct-edit flow
features_tested.details: Textarea with 'Describe what you want to build...' placeholder found

features_tested.feature: Navigation between projects works without crashes
features_tested.details: Navigation back to Project Bin works, no error elements found

critical_code_review_comments: Login button click doesn't trigger form submission - users must press Enter key to login. Consider adding onClick handler or ensuring button type='submit' works correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live streaming preview pipeline fully tested and working. Key findings: (1) Preview iframe renders with proper height (862px, not 0px) - the CSS fix for .em-aurora position override is working. (2) Mode label correctly shows 'React (Babel) + Tailwind' after build. (3) Code tab shows app/page.jsx file. (4) All right panel tabs (Preview, Code, Assets, Logs, Export, Deploy) are accessible. (5) Login requires pressing Enter key - clicking Sign In button doesn't work (minor UX issue). (6) The 'frontend' supervisor process is FATAL as expected (it's a duplicate CRA config - the app uses nextjs_api process on port 3000).
